lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਭੁਗਤਾ ਦੇਦਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਬਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape karataa aape bhugataa dedaa rijak sabaaee |2|
lines.english: He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself is the Enjoyer. He Himself gives sustenance to all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ek naam vasiaa ghatt antar poore kee vaddiaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The One Name abides deep within my heart; such is the glorious greatness of the Perfect Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਜੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape saaje srisatt upaae sir sir dhandhai laaee |4|
lines.english: He Himself fashions and creates the creation; He links each and every person to their task. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੋ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karanaa so kar rahiaa avar na karanaa jaaee |3|
lines.english: Whatever He wants to do, He is doing; no one else can do anything. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਸਰੇਵਹੁ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tiseh sarevahu taa sukh paavahu satigur mel milaaee |5|
lines.english: If you serve Him, then you will find peace; the True Guru will unite you in His Union. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖਣਾ ਜਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aapanaa aap aap upaae alakh na lakhanaa jaaee |6|
lines.english: The Lord Himself creates Himself; the Unseen Lord cannot be seen. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਲੇ ਆਪੇ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aape maar jeevaale aape tis no til na tamaaee |7|
lines.english: He Himself kills, and brings back to life; He does not have even an iota of greed. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਦਾਤੇ ਇਕਿ ਮੰਗਤੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: eik daate ik mangate keete aape bhagat karaaee |8|
lines.english: Some are made givers, and some are made beggars; He Himself inspires us to devotional worship. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਿਨੀ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਸਚੇ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: se vaddabhaagee jinee eko jaataa sache rahe samaaee |9|
lines.english: Those who know the One Lord are very fortunate; they remain absorbed in the True Lord. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aape dukh sukh paae antar aape bharam bhulaaee |11|
lines.english: He Himself infuses pain and pleasure; He Himself makes them wander around in doubt. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਸਿਆਣਾ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: aap saroop siaanaa aape keemat kehan na jaaee |10|
lines.english: He Himself is beautiful, He Himself is wise and clever; His worth cannot be expressed. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਸਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jinee chaakhiaa tinaa saad aaeaa satigur boojh bujhaaee |13|
lines.english: Those who taste, enjoy the flavor; the True Guru imparts this understanding. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਨਿਗੁਰੀ ਅੰਧ ਫਿਰੈ ਲੋਕਾਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: vaddaa daataa guramukh jaataa niguree andh firai lokaaee |12|
lines.english: The Great Giver is revealed to the Gurmukh; without the Guru, the world wanders in darkness. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਇਕਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: eikanaa naavahu aap bhulaae ikanaa guramukh dee bujhaaee |14|
lines.english: Some, the Lord causes to forget and lose the Name; others become Gurmukh, and are granted this understanding. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਰਾਜਾ ਕਰਿ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: tis bin avar na koee raajaa kar tapaavas banat banaaee |16|
lines.english: There is no other King except Him; He administers justice, as He has made it. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਹੁ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa saalaahihu santahu tis dee vaddee vaddiaaee |15|
lines.english: Forever and ever, praise the Lord, O Saints; how glorious is His greatness! ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਆਉ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਸਦ ਸਾਚਾ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਨਾਈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: niaau tisai kaa hai sad saachaa virale hukam manaaee |17|
lines.english: His justice is always True; how rare are those who accept His Command. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: tis no praanee sadaa dhiaavahu jin guramukh banat banaaee |18|
lines.english: O mortal, meditate forever on the Lord, who has made the Gurmukh in His making. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੈ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸੀਝੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettai so jan seejhai jis hiradai naam vasaaee |19|
lines.english: That humble being who meets with the True Guru is fulfilled; the Naam abides in his heart. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਆਪਿ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਣਾਈ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sachaa aap sadaa hai saachaa baanee sabad sunaaee |20|
lines.english: The True Lord is Himself forever True; He announces His Bani, the Word of His Shabad. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਣਿ ਵੇਖਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਥਾਈ ॥੨੧॥੫॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sun vekh rahiaa visamaad meraa prabh raviaa srab thaaee |21|5|14|
lines.english: Nanak is wonderstruck, hearing and seeing His Lord; my God is all-pervading, everywhere. ||21||5||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 5 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਕੀਆ ਪੂਜਾ ਬਿਸਥਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee keea poojaa bisathaaraa |
lines.english: Some make a big show of devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਨਿਵਲ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਮ ਸਾਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee nival bhueiangam saadhe |
lines.english: Some practice inner cleansing teahniques, and control the breath through Kundalini Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਕੀਆ ਪਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਪਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee keea paravirat pasaaraa |
lines.english: Some make a big show of their worldly influence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਨ ਜਾਨਾ ਵੇਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan na jaanaa vesaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I do not know any other way. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਦੀਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mohi deen har har aaraadhe |1|
lines.english: I am meek; I worship and adore the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਤਜਿ ਵਣ ਖੰਡਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee grihu taj van khandd paaeaa |
lines.english: Some abandon their homes, and live in the forests.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਭਰੋਸਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: teraa bharosaa piaare |
lines.english: I place my faith in You alone, O Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਕਹਤਉ ਅਨੰਨਿ ਭਗਉਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: koee kahtau anan bhgautee |
lines.english: Some claim that they are devotees of the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਮੋਨਿ ਅਉਧੂਤੁ ਸਦਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee mon aaudhoot sadaaeaa |
lines.english: Some put themselves on silence, and call themselves hermits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਕਹਿਆ ਹਉ ਤੀਰਥ ਵਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee kahiaa hau teerath vaasee |
lines.english: Some say that they live at sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਦੀਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਓਟ ਲੀਤੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mohi deen har har ott leetee |2|
lines.english: I am meek; I seek the shelter and support of the Lord, Har, Har. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਅੰਨੁ ਤਜਿ ਭਇਆ ਉਦਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: koee an taj bheaa udaasee |
lines.english: Some refuse food and become Udaasis, shaven-headed renunciates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਦੀਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਪਰਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mohi deen har har dar pariaa |3|
lines.english: I am meek; I have fallen at the door of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਭਵਨੁ ਸਭ ਧਰਤੀ ਕਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee bhavan sabh dharatee kariaa |
lines.english: Some have wandered all across the earth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਕਹਿਆ ਮੈ ਕੁਲਹਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee kahiaa mai kuleh vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Some say that they belong to great and noble families.
